segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a vibrant sunset over a cityscape, featuring a large orange sun and silhouetted buildings, as dramatic, suspenseful intro music plays. The text 'EP12 跑男来了' (Episode 12, Running Man is here) is overlaid, signaling the start of the show. The scene transitions to Host Jie Ni, identified by on-screen text, standing in a classical-style stone courtyard. Dressed in a black off-the-shoulder top and white skirt, she holds a small black device and gestures expressively as she greets the audience, welcoming them to 'Running Man'. Jie Ni introduces herself and invites viewers to explore Macau's famous Fisherman's Wharf, highlighting its grand Roman amphitheater and charming European-style coastline, before emphasizing that the most important part is to deliver exclusive behind-the-scenes footage. Following her introduction, the setting shifts to a modern, colorful outdoor area with greenery and geometric structures. Game-like background music begins as participants Bai Lu, Sha Yi, and Li Yunrui, all in white t-shirts with their names printed on the back, are seen walking and searching. Male voices are heard discussing 'Kai Ge' (Brother Kai), speculating he's hiding nearby and mentioning they saw him pass by, noting a 'deep green' color. One voice calls out 'Jia Lin, come here!' Another confirms, 'Kai Ge is hiding here, I saw him walk from here,' reiterating the 'deep green' color. Zheng Kai, identified by on-screen text as '郑恺粉笔', performs a '地毯式搜索' (thorough search), crouching and inspecting the ground closely. Amidst the search, a female voice, likely Bai Lu, exclaims, 'Wow, this is so hard!' The bright, lively environment and engaged participants contribute to a dynamic and energetic atmosphere.

An unidentified male voice, likely '沙溢', confidently states, "I'm telling you, he's definitely hiding here," comparing the hidden person's actions to '陈哲远's previous behavior, adding, "His current performance is exactly like what I just pushed back to Chen Zhuoyuan." Another voice asks, "Whose performance?" as laughter and sound effects punctuate the scene. Participants are heard asking, "Scared, aren't you?" and "Are you hiding there?" while one claims, "I've already got it all." The search continues with questions like "Where is it hidden? Speak quickly!" and observations like "Oh, it's here, right? Came over to see for himself." '陈哲远', in a white checkered shirt, is then seen walking through the same area, searching independently. The voice, likely '沙溢', sarcastically comments, "Can't even find it like this, a bunch of idiots," prompting another to suggest, "Then I'll go in and look." The discussion continues about the hidden person's strategy: "He was just looking over here, seeing if we could get it," and "He's definitely feigning... He deliberately led you here, but he's hiding here, trust me." The segment concludes with a participant urging, "Trust Brother Sha, keep looking," as '李昀锐' walks purposefully through the modern courtyard, passing colorful benches and greenery, his back to the camera, amidst the bright, architecturally distinct 'Teaching Area Building' environment.

segments.integrated_caption: The minute opens with a wide shot of a modern, multi-level outdoor area, vibrant with colorful staircases, greenery, and outdoor seating, establishing a playful environment set to light, suspenseful background music. 白鹿, in her white t-shirt, walks through the greenery with a focused expression, occasionally adjusting her hair. She vocalizes her discomfort, exclaiming "哎哟, 太热了!" (Oh, it's too hot!) and later suggests "拿把扇" (Get a fan), accompanied by the distinct sounds of a fan opening and closing. On-screen text '放弃寻找' (Give up searching) appears. 李昀锐, also in a white t-shirt, walks purposefully through the same colorful outdoor space, his back to the camera, while a male voice (likely his) comments "这, 自损800" (This, self-inflicted 800). The text '坚持' (Persist) appears. 沙溢, similarly dressed, is then seen crouching and searching through dense hedges with determination, frequently vocalizing his search efforts: "我是这边看看" (I'll look over here), "藏这了" (Hidden here), "找" (Search), and "不行, 必须得找, 给它找出来" (No, must find it, find it out). He also comments on the strategy, saying "还是我藏那个地方好, 又凉快" (Still, the place I hid it is good, and cool) and "凯哥藏这, 大家不用搜" (Brother Kai hid it here, everyone doesn't need to search). He later laments, "都放弃了, 都不找了, 都放弃了啊" (Everyone gave up, no one is searching anymore, everyone gave up, huh), and calls out "哥哥来" (Brother, come). The scene shifts indoors to a modern, well-lit space where 白鹿 enters cautiously. Back outdoors, 沙溢 asks, "还有谁的没找到?" (Whose else hasn't been found?), to which a male voice (likely 李昀锐) adds, "太热了!" (It's too hot!). 沙溢 then asks 郑恺粉笔, who is also searching, "陈晨哥你是啥色?" (Brother Chenchen, what color are you?), and 郑恺粉笔 replies, "我是粉的" (I am pink), which 白鹿 confirms, "粉的是陈晨哥的" (Pink is Brother Chenchen's). 范PD, identifiable by his label, walks down a corridor toward the group, who appear to be converging. The minute concludes with 白鹿 smiling and walking alongside 范PD outdoors, suggesting a shift from individual search to collaborative movement, all set against the energetic, game-like atmosphere.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with 李晨, clad in a white 'Keep Running' t-shirt and white pants, descending a staircase in a large, warmly lit auditorium with wooden floors and tiered red seating. As he walks purposefully across the stage, passing '安慕希' yogurt promotional displays, he utters "碎" (broken/shattered) and asks "现在有没有人是整个的呢?" (Is anyone whole now?), to which another male voice responds, "没有是整个的吧现在." (No one is whole now, right?). He continues his search, remarking "换茬" and "没找着呢" (haven't found it yet), while a light, suspenseful background music begins to play. He glances around, bending down to inspect the floor near a camera setup, interacting with crew members, including one with a camera on a tripod and another with a monitor. A bell rings, followed by a distinct 'ding' and a 'clink' sound, prompting an exaggerated "Ahhh" from 李晨, who then comments, "挺怪的" (quite strange) and "感觉有点怪呀这是" (this feels a bit strange). He picks up a small object, possibly a chalk or marker, examining it closely, and questions, "我一进来咱那第一个头, 好像, 演啥呢这是?" (As soon as I came in, our first head, it seems, what is this acting?). As he continues to move through the active, investigative production environment, with multiple cameras and lighting equipment visible, he exclaims "咦, 没有" (huh, no) and notes "这后面没" (not behind here), followed by another "Ahhh" sound. Playfully, he instructs, "我跟你讲, 你别再那啥了, 陈这第一个就碎了, 你家的不好. 你就别故意往炕了, 我跟你讲, 啊. 你自己咋回事, 自己心里有点数." (Let me tell you, don't do that anymore, Chen, this first one is broken, your family's is not good. Don't deliberately go to the kang, I'm telling you, ah. You should know what's wrong with you.). A crew member interjects with a brief "哟." 李晨 then exclaims "哎哟, 哎哟呵" and asks "这啥玩意这是?" (What is this thing?). He states, "这是我, 这是刚刚给我的," which is immediately contradicted by another male voice saying "不是." 李晨 playfully responds "哎, 哎" with a laugh as he walks up a set of red stairs, still holding the object, with the background music continuing and ending with a final 'ding'.

segments.integrated_caption: The chaotic and energetic team challenge unfolds in a large outdoor pool, adorned with tropical decor and illuminated architectural elements, as participants in yellow and blue shirts navigate floating platforms. Amidst constant splashing and an upbeat background track, a male voice (沙溢) urges, "哥，你一起下去吧，你拖了俩" (Brother, go down together, you're dragging two), followed by another male voice shouting "哥，头！" (Brother, head!). The blonde-haired participant (宋雨琦) in yellow, actively pushing and balancing, cries out "抱住他，抱住他！" (Hold him, hold him!) during a struggle, while another male voice shouts "救不到！" (Can't save!). Laughter and excited chatter erupt after a big splash, with 宋雨琦 exclaiming "哇！救我！" (Wah! Save me!). 沙溢's voice is heard again, complaining, "你他抱著我，我下不去，你看他抱著我" (He's holding me, I can't go down, look he's holding me), punctuated by grunts and repeated shouts of "哎呀!" (Aiya!). On-screen text like '第四组出发' (Fourth group departs) and '最后一组出发' (Last group departs) flashes, indicating the challenge's progression. 沙溢 repeatedly shouts his own name, "沙溢!" (Sha Yi!), in a mix of effort and distress. The participant in blue (张真源), lying down and pushing, urgently shouts "别别别别别别别别别！" (No no no no no no no no no!). 宋雨琦 then calls out "沙溢！等一下！" (Sha Yi! Wait a moment!), as 沙溢 warns, "后面有人！后面有人！" (Someone behind! Someone behind!). The segment concludes with intense splashing, shouts, and physical exertion, highlighting the teams' desperate attempts to cross the pool, all while crew members film the action.
segments.visual_original_caption: The video segment captures a chaotic and energetic team-based challenge taking place in a large outdoor pool adorned with tropical decor, including surfboards, life rings, and lush greenery. Participants, divided into teams wearing yellow and blue shirts, are competing on floating platforms that require coordination and balance. The blonde-haired participant (宋雨琦) in a yellow shirt is actively pushing and balancing on the platform, working closely with a participant in a blue shirt who is lying down and pushing from the front. The team struggles to maintain stability as they navigate the water, with members shouting encouragement and instructions like '稳住，我们能赢' (Stay steady, we can win) and '那边下去' (Go down there). On-screen text indicates team departures: '第四组出发' (Fourth group departs) and '最后一组出发' (Last group departs), suggesting a timed or sequential challenge. The camera alternates between close-ups of the participants' strained expressions and wide shots showing the entire pool setup, including the illuminated architectural backdrop. Crew members in black attire are visible, assisting and filming the action. The atmosphere is lively, with splashing water, laughter, and physical exertion as teams attempt to cross the pool without falling off their platforms.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a chaotic and energetic pool challenge, filled with the sounds of splashing water, grunts of effort, and an upbeat soundtrack. Participants in yellow and blue shirts, including '沙溢' and the blonde-haired '宋雨琦' for the yellow team, and '张真源' for the blue team, are seen pushing and balancing on dramatically wobbling floating platforms. An announcer's voice declares "最后15秒" (Last 15 seconds) as the struggle intensifies, with '宋雨琦' letting out distinct screams of exertion as participants fall into the water. On-screen text indicates the yellow team's advantage with '黄队: 2人' and '蓝队: 1人'. The announcer counts down "5, 4, 3, 2, 1", culminating in a whistle blast and cheers as the game concludes with '游戏结束'. Visibly exhausted but smiling, participants exit the pool. '沙溢' is then heard complaining, "张真源把我拖下来了。好累啊。我感觉我跟电梯一样上上下下的。" (Zhang Zhenyuan dragged me down. So tired. I feel like I was going up and down like an elevator.). The scene transitions to a nighttime exterior of the Galaxy Macau resort, illuminated with golden lights, followed by a shot of participants entering a white curtained tent labeled '会客室'. Inside, a female voice asks, "你这哪儿是沙哥?" (Where is this, Brother Sha?), to which '沙溢' replies, "你要去聊天呢，我就去饭堂。" (If you want to chat, I'll go to the cafeteria.), with another male voice, possibly '张真源', interjecting, "你要去啊?" (You're going?). The segment concludes with '张真源', now with wet, reddish hair, appearing tired and contemplative, sitting quietly inside the tent.

segments.integrated_caption: The scene unfolds inside a white curtained tent, labeled '会客室' with a blue 'R' logo and an '安慕希' sign on the wall. Participant '张真源', in a blue shirt with wet, reddish hair, is initially seated contemplatively at a small round table. Light, playful background music begins as Participant '沙溢', in a yellow shirt, enters, approaching the table and engaging '张真源' in conversation. '沙溢' asks, "你知道惩罚是什么吗?" (Do you know what the punishment is?), to which '张真源' responds, "不知道" (I don't know). '沙溢' animatedly discusses "澳门那个蹦极" (that bungee jump in Macau) and the plan for "明天早上我们都走了" (we'll all leave tomorrow morning). '张真源' then remarks, "但是我有点拽" (but I'm a bit cocky/proud), prompting '沙溢' to exclaim, "有点拽, 你看都说漏了" (a bit cocky, you see, you've let it slip!). '沙溢' then states, "我有六票" (I have six tickets), which '张真源' questions with a surprised "真的?" (Really?) and "重新" (Again). '沙溢' repeats, "我有六票". As '沙溢' opens a silver case on the table, revealing a single small object, '张真源' reacts with disbelief, followed by hearty laughter, accompanied by cartoonish sound effects and on-screen text like '计谋成功' (Scheme successful). '沙溢' declares, "你等着受惩罚吧" (You wait for your punishment!), further explaining his prank: "你给我留一个做个效果行不行...不差这一个" (How about you leave one for me to make an effect... it won't make a difference), detailing his plan to leave only one item in the case. After more laughter and sound effects, '沙溢' exits, saying, "就等你来啊" (Just waiting for you to come). Shortly after, another participant in a blue shirt enters, sits down, and shares a moment of laughter with '张真源', maintaining the light-hearted and playful atmosphere, emphasized by on-screen text such as '我太了解你了' (I know you too well) and '给你个惊喜!' (Giving you a surprise!).

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a close-up of a man in a black cap and white robe, who, with a playful and slightly exasperated tone, discusses 'this diamond' and 'not being able to buy this ticket/vote.' The scene quickly shifts to a white curtained tent where he confronts '范PD,' a participant in a blue shirt with wet reddish hair, who is seated and holding a laptop. The man in the cap gestures emphatically, continuing to talk about '50 carats' and how '范PD' 'has none,' while he 'still has one' saved for him, referring to 'the 50-carat diamond I prepared for him.' '范PD' responds with a dismissive hand motion, as on-screen text '不听你解释' (I won't listen to your explanation) appears, followed by laughter. The man in the cap then turns and walks away, leaving '范PD' alone, who leans forward with a smile. A transition to a nighttime exterior of a grand, illuminated 'GALAXY' building is accompanied by light, dramatic background music. A narrator's voice announces that someone received '11 privilege coupons' and instructs them to 'write down the participant you want to vote for and put it in the voting box.' The scene then shows a woman with wet, dark hair, wearing a white cardigan over a blue top, standing behind a blue voting box with a yellow 'R' logo. She apologizes to 'Yao Yitian' and humorously remarks that if the editor cuts to 'this moment,' it might seem like she's 'his person,' but 'he gave her 80,' expressing surprise at the number. She places a card into the box, picks up a phone, and appears to scan or interact with the box, which displays a video, accompanied by rapid clicking sounds. She then holds up a card labeled '范PD一票' (One vote for Fan PD), confirming her vote, and places it into the box, completing the action. The background music continues, and she says 'Sorry' before the segment ends with the clicking sounds.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with host 杰妮, dressed in a black off-the-shoulder top, standing in a classical stone courtyard and speaking animatedly, her clear voice welcoming viewers back and announcing the upcoming segment, "Secrets in the Car." This transitions to a vibrant animated title card featuring a yellow car and the text '车里的悄悄话' (Secrets in the Car), accompanied by upbeat, whimsical music and a distinct "ding" sound. A scenic wide shot of a modern city skyline with a large bridge under a bright blue sky follows, before the perspective shifts to a first-person view from inside a moving vehicle. Inside the van, a young man with dark hair in a white shirt looks out the window before turning to smile at the camera, as the cheerful chatter and laughter of the participants fill the space, underscored by the continuing lighthearted music. The camera pans to reveal several other participants, all in white shirts, including 沙溢, who is seen wearing sunglasses and sipping from a cup with a straw, and 陈哲远, who smiles broadly and gestures playfully. The group's lively interaction is punctuated by excited shouts of "张哲远!" from multiple voices. 沙溢's voice is clearly heard engaging in playful banter, asking "今天怎么人多了这么多呢?" (Why are there so many more people today?) and speculating if 陈哲远's fans "互通了一下都来了?" (communicated and all came?). He continues to playfully distinguish between similar-sounding names, asking "你仔细听听喊的是张哲远还是张哲远?" (Listen carefully, did they shout Zhang Zhe Yuan or Zhang Zhe Yuan?), leading to more laughter and shouts of "张哲远!" The atmosphere remains light-hearted and conversational, with on-screen text like '来都来了' (We’ve come this far) appearing, as 沙溢 comments on the overlapping fan profiles, concluding with "你看张哲远老师" (Look at Teacher Zhang Zhe Yuan) before the segment ends with laughter and the music fading out.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens with a lively interior shot of a moving van, where several participants, all wearing matching white 'Keep Running' t-shirts, are seated in rows, engaging in light-hearted conversation. 沙溢, wearing sunglasses, is seen sipping from a cup with a straw, while 陈哲远, seated in the front row, smiles broadly and gestures playfully. The atmosphere is immediately filled with chatter as a male voice recalls a previous discussion about 'Teacher Jacky Cheung,' prompting a playful debate among several male voices about their memory of the topic, with some remembering and others claiming to have 'forgotten.' The banter escalates when an energetic male voice, identified as 陈哲远, exclaims, 'Yes, Zhang Zheyuan said Jacky Cheung,' which is immediately followed by a female voice playfully remarking, 'Zhang Zheyuan is unhappy now.' This sparks further teasing, with another male voice challenging, 'What's wrong? Can't we mention Jacky Cheung, Zhang Zheyuan?' and later asking, 'Are you on par with Jacky Cheung or something?' amidst laughter. The scene briefly cuts to an indoor setting with large windows and a pink balloon, where the participant in the yellow top and two men in white shirts are seen laughing and reacting to something off-screen. The camera pans to reveal the lively interior of the van, showing multiple participants including 陈哲远, 李昀锐, and a blonde-haired participant, all dressed in white 'Keep Running' shirts. The group is animated, with 陈哲远 smiling broadly and gesturing playfully. Amidst laughter, voices repeatedly call out "张飞," with one participant exclaiming "我笑死" (I'm dying of laughter). The conversation continues about a character named "张飞," with a male voice asking "那个角色是吧?" (that character, right?), to which the blonde-haired participant responds "对" (yes). Another male voice, likely 沙溢, clarifies, "那个角色叫张飞啊" (that character is called Zhang Fei), then humorously questions, "那为什么范丞丞老管你叫张飞呢?" (Then why does Fan Chengcheng always call you Zhang Fei?). She gestures expressively, introducing the segment and encouraging viewers to observe the guests' destinations in Macau and anticipate exciting behind-the-scenes content. This transitions to a title card, '导演组录前会 范PD与会全记录' (Director’s Pre-Recording Meeting: Full Record of Fan PD’s Attendance), with a 'KEEP RUNNING' logo, set to upbeat, rhythmic instrumental music. The scene then shifts to a modern conference room where crew members, many in black t-shirts with a yellow 'R' logo, prepare for a meeting. A woman in a black t-shirt with 'THREE' printed on the back organizes materials, while others arrange chairs and set up a whiteboard with photos and notes. Two seated crew members, one with glasses and a blue lanyard, and another resting his chin on his hand, continue the playful exchange, with on-screen text highlighting their conversation, including "你有意见?" segments.integrated_caption: The scene unfolds in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling and a large screen displaying the 'Keep Running' logo. The man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director) and later playfully referred to as '范导' by an off-screen voice, speaks with a clear, authoritative yet humorous tone. He explains to the blonde-haired man with glasses that for fairness, the blonde-haired man must designate nine staff members, stating, "虽然相对客观...他们可能对我也有意见,也有可能对你也有意见,就是他们相对公平吧." (Although relatively objective... they might have opinions about me, and they might also have opinions about you. They are relatively fair, I guess.) He then adds playfully, "我低低头," followed by laughter. He continues, "所以现在为了公平起见...我们就请你现场来指定九位工作人员,这样的话我们是不改的,且这九位是你定出来的." (So now, for the sake of fairness... we invite you to designate nine staff members on the spot. We won't change this, and these nine will be chosen by you.) The blonde-haired man, holding a phone and a drink, calmly agrees, "行,一切为了保持公允,好吧," (Okay, everything to maintain fairness, alright.) followed by a distinct 'ding' sound. The reddish-haired man then picks up a black hard-shell case labeled '导演道具箱' and opens a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册', flipping through pages with handwritten notes, displaying a serious and concentrated expression. On-screen text '剥夺投票资格' appears briefly. The blonde-haired man then challenges, "这不全是你的的人吗?" (Aren't these all your people?), to which the reddish-haired man denies, "没有," and defends the staff's objectivity, stating they sometimes argue with him until their faces turn red. He adds, "也不是所有人都支持我." (Not everyone supports me either.) A brief cutaway shows two crew members in black t-shirts with yellow 'R' logos, one pointing playfully while the other writes, with on-screen text '范导你的兵在此' and an off-screen voice chanting, "支持范导,打倒姚导!" (Support Director Fan, overthrow Director Yao!), followed by a gong sound, adding a humorous, game-show atmosphere. The blonde-haired man then asks, "你实话谁私下跟你关系最不好?" (Honestly, who has the worst relationship with you privately?), prompting an exaggerated "太多了!" (Too many!) from the reddish-haired man, followed by shared laughter. The blonde-haired man encourages him, "你挑吧,你概率应该还是很大的这分名单." (You choose, your probability should still be very high on this list.) The reddish-haired man sighs, "我来看看啊," as he continues to review the roster, suggesting a pre-recording meeting where roles and procedures are being reviewed under his temporary leadership.

segments.integrated_caption: The video opens in a modern conference room, featuring vertical wood paneling, potted plants, and a large screen displaying the '奔跑吧' (Keep Running) logo. The man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director) and '一日临时总导演', sits at a long white table, reviewing a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) and making notes. He speaks, acknowledging a good choice with "你这个是真的挑的很对，确实," then playfully searches for the "副总编" (Associate Chief Editor), asking "我们的副总编呢？副呢？" and later exclaiming "这儿呢！" upon finding them. He addresses someone as "若言哥" and confidently declares, "我的九位兵我已经马齐了" (my nine soldiers are all assembled), a statement humorously echoed by the on-screen text '范导你的兵在此' as crew members enter. He counts aloud, "一二...三四...五...六七八," then notes, "没人了" (no one left), before deciding, "我我批地吧" (I'll approve it then) and "送你一票" (giving you a vote), directly relating to the game-like voting mechanics suggested by on-screen text like '剥夺投票资格' and '恢复投票资格'. Across the table, the man with blonde hair and glasses, in a light blue striped shirt, listens attentively. He then takes over, speaking in a calm, professional tone, outlining administrative tasks: "除了这些事情之外，我们还有一些其他的事务性的工作要跟你确认." He continues, explaining the next step: "现在也要把各个工作组的，主要的负责人请进来，然后我们一起来商讨一下明天的录制细节," to which the man with reddish hair responds with an acknowledging "好." The man with blonde hair then directs, "那那我们叫我们工作人员进来吧," prompting crew members in black t-shirts with yellow 'R' logos and blue lanyards to enter, some carrying materials. He concludes by offering open communication: "如果你现场有什么问题和指示，也可以随时的沟通，好不好啊，根据你的想法." The room, well-lit with a modern ceiling grid, also shows a whiteboard with photos and notes in the background, indicating pre-meeting preparations. An upbeat, light background music begins to play as the meeting progresses, maintaining the organized, collaborative, and light-hearted tone of the show's dynamic production environment.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with an upbeat background tune as the Man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), is seen in a modern conference room. Seated at a long white table, he reviews a '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) folder and makes notes, with a '导演道具箱' (Director's Prop Box) before him. He greets the crew, saying "看視頻好,嘿嘿" (Watching the video, haha), then introduces the Man with blonde hair and glasses, revealing him as "我們的兄弟團成員范丞丞" (our brother group member Fan Chengcheng), and announces that "從現在開始以及明天的一整天,他是我們的總導演啊" (from now on and for the entire day tomorrow, he is our Chief Director). The crew, including a Crew member with glasses and blue lanyard, a Crew member with black t-shirt and blue lanyard, and a Woman with long dark hair, clap in response to the introduction. The Man with reddish hair then playfully asks, "姚一天明天什麼遊戲也都會參與吧?" (Yao Yitian, will you participate in all games tomorrow?), before revealing a game detail: "如果懲罰我是要接受懲罰,其實是一樣的" (if I am punished, I have to accept the punishment, it's actually the same). The Man with blonde hair and glasses (Fan Chengcheng) asks, "懲罰是什麼?" (What is the punishment?), to which the Man with reddish hair replies, "懲罰明天就知道,我們稍微有個懸念吧" (You'll know the punishment tomorrow, let's keep a little suspense), then jokingly suggests, "這樣懲罰去蹦極" (The punishment is bungee jumping). A crew member exclaims, "你幹嘛!" (What are you doing!), and another adds, "我也不敢" (I don't dare either), prompting the Man with reddish hair to conclude, "所以就別了吧" (So let's not do it then). Laughter erupts from the crew, accompanied by on-screen text like '反应迅速' (Quick Reaction) and '感觉被拿捏了' (Feeling Controlled), as the Man with reddish hair asks, "你倆談啥?" (What are you two talking about?). He then shifts to another topic, instructing, "讓藝人就是說盡量面朝機位拍攝的時候" (to ask the artists to try to face the camera when filming), and questions, "誰,誰老不面朝? 咱們最不面朝的人" (Who, who always doesn't face the camera? The person who faces it the least). The Man with blonde hair and glasses (Fan Chengcheng) asks, "我嗎?" (Me?), and the Man with reddish hair responds, "我不會" (Not me). The scene maintains a lighthearted, collaborative atmosphere, with the 'Keep Running' branding visible throughout.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens in a modern conference room with vertical wood paneling, where a man with reddish hair, identified as the '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), reviews a '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster) at a long white table. He asks, "你还好, 你是不是?" (Are you okay? Are you?) and "谁最不爱面条?" (Who dislikes noodles the most?), prompting a male crew member to ask, "你再说一下谁?" (Could you say who again?). Laughter erupts among the crew members, who wear black shirts with yellow 'R' logos. A woman with long dark hair explains, "这没事, 这很正常, 明天就是要提醒, 有几个重点人你要关注他们就是" (It's fine, this is normal. Tomorrow we just need to remind, there are a few key people you need to pay attention to...). On-screen text '剥夺投票资格' (Revoked Voting Rights) briefly appears as the director gestures, emphasizing that "投入进去之后他们就忘了再拍, 非常投入, 这个时候导演就得提醒, 要保证他们的正面镜头什么的，就是看清他们的表达什么的，好吧?" (Once they get into it, they forget they're being filmed, they're very engaged. At this point, the director needs to remind them, to ensure their front-facing shots and such, to clearly see their expressions and so on, okay?). He concludes, "行, 那我们就散会了" (Alright, then we'll adjourn the meeting), echoed by a crew member saying, "散会!" (Adjourn!). The crew claps, and a man with short dark hair reacts to a blue tissue near his eye before checking his phone with a satisfied expression, marked by on-screen text '满意' (satisfied). The director then stands, gesturing toward the screen, stating, "那个, 会是开会, 密谋" (That, the meeting is a meeting, a plot), followed by "密谋结束" (Plot ends), which appears as on-screen text. A voice says, "好, 辛苦了, 辛苦了" (Okay, good work, good work). Upbeat, dramatic music begins as a title card appears, with a female voiceover announcing, "让我们来看看范PD的精彩表现吧!" (Let’s see Fan PD’s amazing performance!). The scene shifts to an auditorium where the same man, now referred to as Fan PD, walks confidently in white sunglasses, discussing team divisions: "那个他刚让我分队, 我一队分五个, 一队分六个, 只有十个人哪来的六个?" (He just asked me to divide teams, I divided one team into five, one team into six. There are only ten people, where did the six come from?). He approaches a laptop displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). As he smiles, on-screen text '制裁' (Punishment) appears. He playfully asserts, "没有这件事情" (There's no such thing) in response to a crew member asking, "你在哪队?" (Which team are you on?), and declares, "那我要收回这个权利了" (Then I'm taking back this right) after another voice insists, "有" (There is), adding, "你要叫我就收回这个权利了" (If you call me, I'll take back this right). The segment ends with a close-up of the laptop screen as a woman's voice asks, "今年几批了?" (How many batches this year?).

audio_updated_entities.Man with reddish hair in white shirt: Seated at a long white table in a modern conference room, wearing a white shirt, reviewing a black folder labeled '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster), making notes with a pen, and gesturing while speaking. Identified by on-screen text as '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director). He asks, '你还好, 你是不是?' (Are you okay? Are you?) and '谁最不爱面条?' (Who dislikes noodles the most?), then explains the director's role: '投入进去之后他们就忘了再拍, 非常投入, 这个时候导演就得提醒, 要保证他们的正面镜头什么的，就是看清他们的表达什么的，好吧?' (Once they get into it, they forget they're being filmed, they're very engaged. At this point, the director needs to remind them, to ensure their front-facing shots and such, to clearly see their expressions and so on, okay?). He concludes the meeting with '行, 那我们就散会了' (Alright, then we'll adjourn the meeting) and declares '密谋结束' (Plot ends). Later, as Fan PD, he is seen wearing white sunglasses and a blue lanyard, walking confidently in an auditorium, smiling as he approaches a laptop displaying a video titled 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). He discusses team divisions: '那个他刚让我分队, 我一队分五个, 一队分六个, 只有十个人哪来的六个?' (He just asked me to divide teams, I divided one team into five, one team into six. There are only ten people, where did the six come from?), and playfully asserts, '没有这件事情' (There's no such thing) and '那我要收回这个权利了' (Then I'm taking back this right), adding '你要叫我就收回这个权利了' (If you call me, I'll take back this right).
audio_updated_entities.Woman with long dark hair and blue lanya: Seated at the table, wearing a black t-shirt with a yellow 'R' logo and a blue lanyard, holding papers and actively participating in the meeting, gesturing and engaging with other crew members. She explains, '这没事, 这很正常, 明天就是要提醒, 有几个重点人你要关注他们就是' (It's fine, this is normal. Tomorrow we just need to remind, there are a few key people you need to pay attention to...). Later, a woman's voice, likely hers or another female crew member, asks, '今年几批了?' (How many batches this year?).
audio_updated_entities.Crew member (unspecified, male voice): A male crew member's voice is heard asking, '你再说一下谁?' (Could you say who again?) in response to the director's question. He also echoes '散会!' (Adjourn!) and later engages in playful banter with Fan PD, asking '你在哪队?' (Which team are you on?) and insisting '有' (There is) regarding a 'right,' and asking '什么?' (What?) when Fan PD threatens to revoke a right.
audio_updated_entities.Female Voiceover: A female voiceover announces, '让我们来看看范PD的精彩表现吧!' (Let’s see Fan PD’s amazing performance!) over an upbeat, dramatic music track.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with an upbeat, light background music as a crew member holds a monitor displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审' (EP08 The Disappeared TA Final Review). The man with reddish hair, wearing white sunglasses and a blue lanyard, observes intently, asking "我镜头多吗？" (Do I have a lot of screen time?), to which another voice replies "还可以" (It's okay). He then remarks, "上期不多。上期后面30分钟说我消失了" (Not much last episode. The last 30 minutes of the last episode said I disappeared), prompting another crew member to ask, "那你干嘛去了？" (Then where did you go?). He responds, "不知道啊。老是说我在干嘛？你应该是再找，单纯的找东西" (I don't know. What do they always say I'm doing? You should be looking, simply looking for things). The scene shifts to him walking confidently through an auditorium with empty wooden seats, smiling as he approaches a laptop displaying the same video. He transitions to an outdoor nighttime setting, walking past the grand, illuminated Galaxy Macau resort exterior with golden lights. He proceeds to a large outdoor pool with floating platforms and tropical decor, where he crouches and inspects the area, asking "是冷的吗？" (Is it cold?). A crew member reassures him, "还好，这天感觉这水温还行" (It's okay, the water temperature feels alright today). He then playfully declares, "我以及学会了你这套话术了，没办法，辛苦了大家" (I've already learned your way of speaking, no choice, everyone worked hard), eliciting laughter from the surrounding crew. He interacts with a group of crew members, including a woman with long dark hair and a blue lanyard, who hands him a whiteboard with handwritten groupings like 'Q SY ZK' and 'LC FCC BL'. A female voice asks, "那就是你刚刚分的组？" (So those are the groups you just divided?), to which the man, identified as '范PD' by his white t-shirt, confirms, "对。老一天试图篡改我的分组" (Yes. Lao Yitian tried to tamper with my groups). Another voice denies, "没有篡改" (No tampering), and 范PD clarifies, "试图" (Tried), followed by laughter. On-screen text '范PD提前定好的游戏分组' (Fan PD's pre-determined game groups) appears. The female voice then states, "待会儿就按这个给大家" (Later, we'll give everyone according to this), and 范PD confirms, "就按这个给他们穿了啊" (So they'll wear according to this). The segment ends with 范PD standing among the crew, smiling and gesturing, as he announces, "然后我们这一季也将会再水中杀青" (And this season, we will also conclude in the water), met with laughter and a crew member's "可以" (Okay) and a female voice adding "听你的" (Listening to you), suggesting a playful yet strategic planning phase for the upcoming game.

segments.integrated_caption: The segment opens with a behind-the-scenes look at a production set, where a man with reddish hair, identified by on-screen text as the '临时总导演' (Temporary Chief Director), wearing a white t-shirt and a blue lanyard, is seated at a table reviewing documents like a '工作人员花名册' (Staff Roster). He is heard saying "好" (good/okay), to which another male voice responds "好". He interacts with crew members in black shirts with yellow 'R' logos and blue lanyards, some holding phones or a monitor displaying 'EP08 消失的TA 终审', indicating a pre-recording meeting in a modern conference room with wood paneling and potted plants. A large screen displays the 'Keep Running' logo. A light, reflective background music begins as the scene then transitions with a quick blur to an outdoor location, revealing a grand, ancient-style stone amphitheater under a bright blue sky. A female host, identified as 杰妮, stands in the center of a geometrically patterned courtyard in front of the amphitheater, wearing a black off-the-shoulder top and white pants. She holds a black device and gestures while speaking, delivering a closing message for the show in a clear, expressive voice. On-screen text appears, stating that this is the final episode of '奔跑吧' Season 13, titled '跑男来了', and expresses sentimentality about farewells while encouraging viewers to look forward to future episodes. 杰妮 concludes her message by saying, "本期节目是奔跑吧13季的最后一期跑男来了，虽然每一次告别都非常的伤感，但是我们短暂的告别是为了下一次更美好的相遇。大家可以期待一下我们下一期节目会跑去哪些地方呢？那我们下期节目再见啦！" (This episode is the final episode of Keep Running Season 13, 'Running Man is Here'. Although every farewell is very sentimental, our brief farewell is for a more beautiful reunion next time. Everyone can look forward to where we will run to in the next episode? Then we'll see you in the next episode!). She waves goodbye as the 浙江卫视 logo appears on screen, concluding the segment with a warm, reflective tone, accompanied by the continuing background music.
